# Phase log: 3 distinct repeat-3+ scripts

# Group A (build): 3 invocations
$ bash scripts/build.sh --release
$ bash scripts/build.sh --release
$ bash scripts/build.sh --debug

# Group B (deploy): 3 invocations
$ python3 deploy.py --env prod
$ python3 deploy.py --env stage
$ python3 deploy.py --env dev

# Group C (lint): 3 invocations
$ npm run lint
$ npm run lint
$ npm run lint
